narrative_beat: Figura com sete estrelas e olhos de chamas carmesim

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid divine apparition in blazing white and gold holding seven stars with crimson flame eyes seen from below in majesty in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the seven stars held in the divine hand and the crimson flame eyes
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated empty modern office with chairs and grey tables in background
props: divine apparition in blazing white and gold

environment.location: transcendent space above empty modern office

composition.foreground: divine figure in vivid blazing white gold

style.post_processing: halation, divine halation, crushed blacks, gold saturation
style.texture_detail: 35mm grain, dust motes in divine beam

mood.emotion: the Author of the prophecy identified

symbolism.primary: the one who dictated Revelation now watches it execute
symbolism.secondary: seven stars as authority over seven epochs including ours

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
